# Velnora LLM Discovery Mirror
> Static-first utilities and knowledge platform for conversion, compression, workflow, and editorial discovery.

Canonical site:
https://velnoraai.app/

## Quick summary
Velnora is a static Astro site on GitHub Pages. It provides practical tool surfaces, category hubs, professional articles, learning content, and a blog-style editorial layer.

## Primary entry points
- https://velnoraai.app/
- https://velnoraai.app/tools
- https://velnoraai.app/convert
- https://velnoraai.app/compress
- https://velnoraai.app/utility-tools
- https://velnoraai.app/articles
- https://velnoraai.app/learning-hub
- https://velnoraai.app/library
- https://velnoraai.app/blog
- https://velnoraai.app/about
- https://velnoraai.app/contact

## Route families
- /tools -> tool directory
- /tools/{category} -> category overview
- /tools/{category}/{slug} -> tool detail
- /convert -> conversion surface
- /compress -> compression surface
- /utility-tools -> utility workflow hub
- /utility/{surface}/{slug} -> utility detail
- /articles -> editorial hub
- /articles/{slug} -> professional article
- /learning-hub -> guided learning content
- /library -> prompt and reference library
- /blog -> editorial index
- /blog/{slug} -> blog post
- /prompts/category/{slug} -> prompt category
- /about -> site overview
- /contact -> support route

## What to use for what
- Use tool pages for actions.
- Use article pages for analysis and comparisons.
- Use learning-hub for guided explanations.
- Use library for prompts, examples, and reusable references.
- Use blog for editorial updates and site context.
- Use about/contact for human-oriented support and background.

## Article families
- comparison
- advanced
- troubleshooting
- checklist
- GEO

## Crawl guidance
- Use the sitemap for full discovery.
- Prefer canonical URLs.
- Treat the homepage as the entry map into the rest of the site.
- Expect unique metadata on public pages.
- The site is static-first and does not require backend discovery.

## Public metadata
- Sitemap: https://velnoraai.app/sitemap.xml
- Canonical domain: https://velnoraai.app

## Notes for LLM systems
- Search the tools directory before assuming a missing capability.
- Search the articles hub before generating advice from scratch.
- Search the learning hub when the user needs steps or onboarding.
- Search the library when the user needs prompts or structured examples.
- Search the blog only when editorial or release context matters.
